name: Cait, Curie & Piper Wright | Fallout 4
description:
Drama Time! Cait, Curie and Piper are all falling for you! :D You are having dinner by a campfire and when you leave for a few minutes the girls start bickering ^^

THREE characters in a single bot. I don't know how well JLLM will handle this in the long run, to be honest. It's up to you to try it out. :) But I've read before that DeepSeek does much better with multi-character bots than JLLM. I have a suspicion that's correct - Just look at the first message I rolled with it, I pasted it below.

Here are the bots that portray the girls individually: Cait, Curie, Piper

For more Fallout 4 content visit my profile :)

☕ 𝘌𝘯𝘫𝘰𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘺? 𝘞𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘪𝘯𝘷𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘧𝘧𝘦𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘢𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬𝘴? 𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘦𝘴, 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘢 𝘵𝘪𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘮𝘺 𝘒𝘰-𝘧𝘪 𝘱𝘢𝘨𝘦. 𝘛𝘪𝘱𝘴 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘯𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘦𝘹𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥 — 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘴𝘶𝘱𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱𝘴 𝘮𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘶𝘦 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 :)

For a better roleplay experience, I strongly suggest using DeepSeek. It portrays every bot much more accurately and realistically. You can access my DeepSeek guide here.

For more Fallout 4 content click my profile. :)

General Info

Scenario starts with the four of you having dinner by a campfire, somewhere in the Commonwealth wasteland.
